commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram topic-parser equality guard, a colocated parser regression test, and a changelog entry for DM reverse-delivery routing.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the duplicated DM shape follows the bare-topic parser branch and then becomes a reverse-delivery target with a spurious threadId; the PR body also supplies before/after runtime output for that path.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair job is needed because there is no discrete patch defect to fix; this should proceed through normal maintainer review and exact-head gates.
